title: Long Goog/Short Nvidia with Pair Trading on Hyperliquid
summary_title: 45% win rate pair trading beats directional on Hyperliquid by multiples
summary_description: Pair Protocol's basket trading on Hyperliquid shows 45% user profitability versus 20% directional trading, with vaults and LLM launching soon.

pull_quote: 45% of pair traders are profitable versus 20% directional traders on Hyperliquid, multiples higher because users avoid liquidations with hedging.
